chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يُدْخَلْ بِهَا وَ مَا لَهَا مِنَ الصَّدَاقِ وَ الْعِدَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 46 – The woman widowed from her husband and not having been slept with, and what is for her from the dower, and the waiting period

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/205)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/205)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ هَلَكَ زَوْجُهَا وَ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ بِهَا قَالَ لَهَا الْمِيرَاثُ وَ عَلَيْهَا الْعِدَّةُ كَامِلَةً وَ إِنْ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلَهَا نِصْفُهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلَا شَيْ‏ءَ لَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a woman whose husband died and he had not slept with her. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For her is the inheritance, and upon her is the waiting period; and if a dower has been specified for her, so for her would be half of it, and if a dower has not been specified for her, so there is nothing for her’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman whose husband dies before going to bed with her. He (the Imam) said, ‘She inherits and must count the waiting period, if mahr (dower) was set for her she deserved one-half of it, otherwise, she does not have the right to demand mahr (dower).”’
